meaning: n.条,棒(常用作栅栏,扣栓物),横木,酒吧间,栅,障碍物vt.禁止,阻挡,妨碍,把门关住,除...之外,(Bar)律师业 /n.条形/柱形图
examples: At the bar he ordered a cider.
She was sitting at the bar.
Brian was ensconced behind the bar.
Jackson, nestled in the scenic town of Bar Harbor, Maine, is in the mouse business.
Scott McClellan, Mr Bush's press secretary, repeats banalities while trying to raise the bar for wrongdoing.
